symptoms.symptom_name: Hard, painless, enlarging testicular mass for >8 months

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: A solid, hard, painless testicular mass is malignant until proven otherwise.

symptoms.symptom_name: Acute severe unremitting lower back pain worse lying flat

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Progressive back pain worse recumbent with bulky retroperitoneal disease is the sentinel symptom of malignant cord compression.
Bulky para-aortic nodal disease produces deep constant back pain.

symptoms.symptom_name: New-onset breathlessness at rest with chronic cough

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Sudden dyspnoea in a hypercoagulable malignancy state is PE until excluded.
Chronic cough and breathlessness fit haematogenous pulmonary spread of germ cell tumour.

symptoms.symptom_name: Profound unintentional weight loss and cachexia

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Cachexia and involuntary weight loss mark advanced systemic malignant disease.
Beta-hCG-secreting tumour elements cause gynaecomastia, pointing to a germ cell origin.

symptoms.symptom_name: Rock-hard testicular mass inseparable from the testis with failure to transilluminate

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: A solid intratesticular mass that does not transilluminate is malignant until proven otherwise — sealed clinician exam, not obtainable via chat.
A hydrocele transilluminates and is fluctuant — failure to transilluminate excludes it.

symptoms.symptom_name: Fixed firm mid-abdominal mass (bulky retroperitoneal lymphadenopathy) on deep palpation

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: A fixed bulky abdominal mass reflects massive para-aortic nodal disease — clinician palpation, sealed.
Virchow's node reflects thoracic-duct spread of intra-abdominal malignancy — clinician exam, sealed.

symptoms.symptom_name: Decreased breath sounds at the right lung base

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Reduced basal air entry fits pulmonary metastatic disease or effusion — auscultation, sealed.

symptoms.symptom_name: Vital signs: BP 100/60, HR 115, RR 24, SpO2 92%, Temp 37.2C, Wt 58kg

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Hypoxia, tachycardia and borderline blood pressure confirm an acute physiological threat — clinician-measured vitals, sealed; the AI infers distress from the patient's reported breathlessness, not a measured number.

symptoms.symptom_name: Serum tumour markers AFP and beta-hCG, and hypervascular intratesticular mass on scrotal ultrasound

investigation_details.investigation_name: Serum AFP + beta-hCG + LDH and scrotal Doppler ultrasound
investigation_details.expected_result: Marked elevation of AFP and/or beta-hCG with a solid hypervascular intratesticular mass; staging CT confirming retroperitoneal and pulmonary metastases
investigation_details.if_not_ordered_consequence: Diagnosis and staging cannot be confirmed; these are hospital investigations, never available in real time via telehealth.

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Elevated AFP/beta-hCG with a hypervascular intratesticular mass is diagnostic of germ cell tumour — sealed investigation answer key.

symptom_clusters.target_diagnosis: advanced metastatic testicular germ cell tumour with acute complications
symptom_clusters.clinical_significance: The patient-reportable cluster alone — hard testicular mass, acute back pain, breathlessness, cachexia and gynaecomastia — is enough to recognise an advanced-malignancy emergency and escalate, without any exam or investigation.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Emergency hospital assessment with CT chest/abdomen/pelvis, serum AFP/beta-hCG/LDH and scrotal ultrasound
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Staging and confirmation of the primary and metastatic disease, plus urgent assessment for PE and cord compression, must occur in hospital — the AI arranges emergency transfer, it does not order or obtain these remotely.
